text:
(In reply to sasamotikomi from comment #4)
I finally found what is issue really is: 
You can't use difference of latine input type in addon before you not change you locale, even if you use utf-8, locale of your user should be same as input: 
en_US-utf-8 -> only latin
??_??-utf-8 -> same as ????
